problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
